message:
feat(core): lifecycle canary timing + crash loop detection

Enhance LifecycleRecord with time-aware canary management:

- should_auto_promote_at(now): testable promotion check at arbitrary
  instant, replacing wall-clock-dependent should_auto_promote()
- canary_expires_in_secs_at(now): compute remaining canary time for
  operator UX display and automation scheduling
- canary_start_timestamp(): extracted helper for consistent transition
  lookup
- record_crash_and_maybe_rollback(): CrashLoopDetector integration that
  records crashes and auto-triggers rollback when threshold is reached,
  with proper error handling for NoRollbackTarget and InvalidTransition
- CrashLoopDetector with configurable threshold, window, and crash
  history tracking via VecDeque

Updated test vectors (enrollment + simulate CBOR) for schema alignment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
